'''鈭歞-d-k''' ('''dedik''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:learn|learn]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-d-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:learn|learn]]
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-d-k
|-
! Lemma
| dedik
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dadakithi|dadakithi]] || [[word:dadakiji|dadakiji]] || [[word:dadakishi|dadakishi]] || [[word:dadaki|dadaki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dadakuthuth|dadakuthuth]] || [[word:dadakujuj|dadakujuj]] || [[word:dadakushush|dadakushush]] || [[word:dadak|dadak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dadakuthu|dadakuthu]] || [[word:dadakuju|dadakuju]] || [[word:dadakushu|dadakushu]] || [[word:dadaku|dadaku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dadakufuth|dadakufuth]] || [[word:dadakufuj|dadakufuj]] || [[word:dadakufush|dadakufush]] || [[word:dadakuf|dadakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dadakethe|dadakethe]] || [[word:dadakeje|dadakeje]] || [[word:dadakeshe|dadakeshe]] || [[word:dadake|dadake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dadakothoth|dadakothoth]] || [[word:dadakojoj|dadakojoj]] || [[word:dadakoshosh|dadakoshosh]] || [[word:dadak|dadak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dadakotho|dadakotho]] || [[word:dadakojo|dadakojo]] || [[word:dadakosho|dadakosho]] || [[word:dadako|dadako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dadakofoth|dadakofoth]] || [[word:dadakofoj|dadakofoj]] || [[word:dadakofosh|dadakofosh]] || [[word:dadakof|dadakof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dadak忙th忙|dadak忙th忙]] || [[word:dadak忙j忙|dadak忙j忙]] || [[word:dadak忙sh忙|dadak忙sh忙]] || [[word:dadak忙|dadak忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dadakathath|dadakathath]] || [[word:dadakajaj|dadakajaj]] || [[word:dadakashash|dadakashash]] || [[word:dadak|dadak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dadakatha|dadakatha]] || [[word:dadakaja|dadakaja]] || [[word:dadakasha|dadakasha]] || [[word:dadaka|dadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dadakafath|dadakafath]] || [[word:dadakafaj|dadakafaj]] || [[word:dadakafash|dadakafash]] || [[word:dadakaf|dadakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dadakasha|dadakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godadakasha|godadakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidadakasha|gokidadakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dadakn眉sha|dadakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godadaknkn眉sha|godadaknkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidadakn眉sha|gokidadakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dadaksh毛sha|dadaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godadaknksh毛sha|godadaknksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidadaksh毛sha|gokidadaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dadakrosha|dadakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godadaknkrosha|godadaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidadakrosha|gokidadakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dadakmusha|dadakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godadaknkmusha|godadaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidadakmusha|gokidadakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dadaksherasha|dadaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godadaknksherasha|godadaknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidadaksherasha|gokidadaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dadakngasha|dadakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godadaknkngasha|godadaknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidadakngasha|gokidadakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dadakyasha|dadakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godadaknkyasha|godadaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidadakyasha|gokidadakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dadakyamasha|dadakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godadaknkyamasha|godadaknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidadakyamasha|gokidadakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dadakn眉sh毛sha|dadakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godadaknkn眉sh毛sha|godadaknkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidadakn眉sh毛sha|gokidadakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dadakn眉rosha|dadakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godadaknkn眉rosha|godadaknkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidadakn眉rosha|gokidadakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dadakn眉musha|dadakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godadaknkn眉musha|godadaknkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidadakn眉musha|gokidadakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dadaksh毛n眉sha|dadaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godadaknksh毛n眉sha|godadaknksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidadaksh毛n眉sha|gokidadaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dadaksh毛rosha|dadaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godadaknksh毛rosha|godadaknksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidadaksh毛rosha|gokidadaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dadaksh毛musha|dadaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godadaknksh毛musha|godadaknksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidadaksh毛musha|gokidadaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dadakron眉sha|dadakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godadaknkron眉sha|godadaknkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidadakron眉sha|gokidadakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dadakrosh毛sha|dadakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godadaknkrosh毛sha|godadaknkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidadakrosh毛sha|gokidadakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dadakromusha|dadakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godadaknkromusha|godadaknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidadakromusha|gokidadakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dadakmun眉sha|dadakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godadaknkmun眉sha|godadaknkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidadakmun眉sha|gokidadakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dadakmush毛sha|dadakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godadaknkmush毛sha|godadaknkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidadakmush毛sha|gokidadakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dadakmurosha|dadakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godadaknkmurosha|godadaknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidadakmurosha|gokidadakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dadak|dadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:d忙d忙k|d忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodadak|hodadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hod忙d忙k|hod忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodadak|hohodadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohod忙d忙k|hohod忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dadak|n眉dadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉d忙d忙k|n眉d忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dadak|n眉n眉dadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉d忙d忙k|n眉n眉d忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dadak|n茂dadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂d忙d忙k|n茂d忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dadak|n茂n茂dadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂d忙d忙k|n茂n茂d忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludadak|ludadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lud忙d忙k|lud忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludadak|luludadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulud忙d忙k|lulud忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidadak|lidadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lid忙d忙k|lid忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidadak|lilidadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilid忙d忙k|lilid忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodadak|kodadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kod忙d忙k|kod忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodadak|kokodadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokod忙d忙k|kokod忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedadak|kedadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ked忙d忙k|ked忙d忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedadak|kekedadak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keked忙d忙k|keked忙d忙k]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
